raw_sql:
WITH movie_company_countries AS (
  SELECT 
    mc.movie_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT cn.country_code) AS n_countries
  FROM movie_companies mc
  JOIN company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
  JOIN title t ON mc.movie_id = t.id
  WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 1995 AND 2015
    AND t.kind_id = 1  -- movies only
    AND cn.country_code IS NOT NULL
    AND cn.country_code != ''
  GROUP BY mc.movie_id
)
SELECT 
  CASE WHEN n_countries = 1 THEN 'single-country'
       WHEN n_countries = 2 THEN '2 countries'
       WHEN n_countries = 3 THEN '3 countries'
       WHEN n_countries >= 4 THEN '4+ countries'
  END AS production_type,
  COUNT(*) AS n_movies,
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (), 1) AS pct
FROM movie_company_countries
GROUP BY production_type
ORDER BY MIN(n_countries);

groupby_keys: CASE WHEN (movie_company_countries.n_countries = 1) THEN 'single-country'::text WHEN (movie_company_countries.n_countries = 2) THEN '2 countries'::text WHEN (movie_company_countries.n_countries = 3) THEN '3 countries'::text WHEN (movie_company_countries.n_countries >= 4) THEN '4+ countries'::text ELSE NULL::text END

raw_sql:
WITH movie_company_countries AS (
  SELECT 
    mc.movie_id,
    CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT cn.country_code) = 1 THEN 'single-country'
         ELSE 'multi-country'
    END AS prod_type
  FROM movie_companies mc
  JOIN company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
  JOIN title t ON mc.movie_id = t.id
  WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 1995 AND 2015
    AND t.kind_id = 1
    AND cn.country_code IS NOT NULL
    AND cn.country_code != ''
  GROUP BY mc.movie_id
),
ratings AS (
  SELECT movie_id, info::numeric AS rating
  FROM movie_info_idx
  WHERE info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating')
)
SELECT 
  mcc.prod_type,
  COUNT(*) AS n_movies,
  ROUND(AVG(r.rating)::numeric, 3) AS avg_rating,
  ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY r.rating)::numeric, 2) AS median_rating,
  ROUND(STDDEV(r.rating)::numeric, 3) AS stddev_rating,
  ROUND(MIN(r.rating)::numeric, 1) AS min_rating,
  ROUND(MAX(r.rating)::numeric, 1) AS max_rating
FROM movie_company_countries mcc
JOIN ratings r ON mcc.movie_id = r.movie_id
GROUP BY mcc.prod_type
ORDER BY mcc.prod_type;

WITH movie_company_countries AS (
  SELECT 
    mc.movie_id,
    CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT cn.country_code) = 1 THEN 'single-country'
         ELSE 'multi-country'
    END AS prod_type
  FROM movie_companies mc
  JOIN company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
  JOIN title t ON mc.movie_id = t.id
  WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 1995 AND 2015
    AND t.kind_id = 1
    AND cn.country_code IS NOT NULL
    AND cn.country_code != ''
  GROUP BY mc.movie_id
),
genres AS (
  SELECT movie_id, info AS genre
  FROM movie_info
  WHERE info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'genres')
)
SELECT 
  g.genre,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE mcc.prod_type = 'multi-country') AS multi_count,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE mcc.prod_type = 'single-country') AS single_count,
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE mcc.prod_type = 'multi-country') / 
        NULLIF(SUM(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE mcc.prod_type = 'multi-country')) OVER (), 0), 2) AS multi_pct,
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE mcc.prod_type = 'single-country') / 
        NULLIF(SUM(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE mcc.prod_type = 'single-country')) OVER (), 0), 2) AS single_pct
FROM movie_company_countries mcc
JOIN genres g ON mcc.movie_id = g.movie_id
GROUP BY g.genre
HAVING COUNT(*) > 500
ORDER BY multi_pct DESC
LIMIT 20;

WITH movie_company_countries AS (
  SELECT 
    mc.movie_id,
    CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT cn.country_code) = 1 THEN 'single-country'
         ELSE 'multi-country'
    END AS prod_type
  FROM movie_companies mc
  JOIN company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
  JOIN title t ON mc.movie_id = t.id
  WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 1995 AND 2015
    AND t.kind_id = 1
    AND cn.country_code IS NOT NULL
    AND cn.country_code != ''
  GROUP BY mc.movie_id
),
runtimes AS (
  SELECT movie_id, 
         -- Extract first numeric sequence from runtime string
         REGEXP_REPLACE(info, '[^0-9].*', '')::integer AS runtime_min
  FROM movie_info
  WHERE info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'runtimes')
    AND info ~ '^\d+'
),
genres AS (
  SELECT movie_id
  FROM movie_info
  WHERE info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'genres')
    AND info = 'Short'
)
SELECT 
  mcc.prod_type,
  COUNT(*) AS n_movies,
  ROUND(AVG(rt.runtime_min)::numeric, 1) AS avg_runtime,
  ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY rt.runtime_min)::numeric, 0) AS median_runtime,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE rt.runtime_min < 40) AS shorts_count,
  ROUND(AVG(rt.runtime_min) FILTER (WHERE rt.runtime_min >= 40)::numeric, 1) AS avg_runtime_features_only
FROM movie_company_countries mcc
JOIN runtimes rt ON mcc.movie_id = rt.movie_id
WHERE rt.runtime_min BETWEEN 1 AND 600
  AND mcc.movie_id NOT IN (SELECT movie_id FROM genres)  -- exclude tagged Shorts
GROUP BY mcc.prod_type
ORDER BY mcc.prod_type;

WITH movie_company_countries AS (
  SELECT 
    mc.movie_id,
    CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT cn.country_code) = 1 THEN 'single-country'
         ELSE 'multi-country'
    END AS prod_type
  FROM movie_companies mc
  JOIN company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
  JOIN title t ON mc.movie_id = t.id
  WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 1995 AND 2015
    AND t.kind_id = 1
    AND cn.country_code IS NOT NULL
    AND cn.country_code != ''
  GROUP BY mc.movie_id
),
cast_with_aka AS (
  SELECT 
    ci.movie_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ci.person_id) AS total_cast,
    COUNT(DISTINCT an.person_id) AS cast_with_aka
  FROM cast_info ci
  JOIN movie_company_countries mcc ON ci.movie_id = mcc.movie_id
  LEFT JOIN aka_name an ON ci.person_id = an.person_id
  WHERE ci.role_id IN (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor','actress'))
  GROUP BY ci.movie_id
)
SELECT 
  mcc.prod_type,
  COUNT(*) AS n_movies,
  ROUND(AVG(ca.total_cast)::numeric, 1) AS avg_cast_size,
  ROUND(AVG(ca.cast_with_aka)::numeric, 1) AS avg_cast_with_aka,
  ROUND(100.0 * AVG(ca.cast_with_aka::float / NULLIF(ca.total_cast, 0))::numeric, 1) AS avg_pct_intl_cast,
  ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY ca.cast_with_aka::float / NULLIF(ca.total_cast, 0))::numeric, 3) AS median_pct_intl_cast
FROM movie_company_countries mcc
JOIN cast_with_aka ca ON mcc.movie_id = ca.movie_id
WHERE ca.total_cast > 0
GROUP BY mcc.prod_type
ORDER BY mcc.prod_type;

WITH movie_country_count AS (
  SELECT 
    mc.movie_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT cn.country_code) AS n_countries
  FROM movie_companies mc
  JOIN company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
  JOIN title t ON mc.movie_id = t.id
  WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 1995 AND 2015
    AND t.kind_id = 1
    AND cn.country_code IS NOT NULL
    AND cn.country_code != ''
  GROUP BY mc.movie_id
),
ratings AS (
  SELECT movie_id, info::numeric AS rating
  FROM movie_info_idx
  WHERE info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating')
),
top_genres AS (
  SELECT movie_id, info AS genre
  FROM movie_info
  WHERE info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'genres')
    AND info IN ('Drama','Comedy','Thriller','Action','Crime','Horror','Romance','Documentary')
)
SELECT 
  g.genre,
  ROUND(AVG(r.rating) FILTER (WHERE mcc.n_countries = 1)::numeric, 3) AS single_avg,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE mcc.n_countries = 1) AS single_n,
  ROUND(AVG(r.rating) FILTER (WHERE mcc.n_countries >= 2)::numeric, 3) AS multi_avg,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE mcc.n_countries >= 2) AS multi_n,
  ROUND((AVG(r.rating) FILTER (WHERE mcc.n_countries >= 2) - 
         AVG(r.rating) FILTER (WHERE mcc.n_countries = 1))::numeric, 3) AS delta
FROM movie_country_count mcc
JOIN ratings r ON mcc.movie_id = r.movie_id
JOIN top_genres g ON mcc.movie_id = g.movie_id
GROUP BY g.genre
HAVING COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE mcc.n_countries = 1) > 100
   AND COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE mcc.n_countries >= 2) > 100
ORDER BY delta DESC;

WITH movie_country_count AS (
  SELECT 
    mc.movie_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT cn.country_code) AS n_countries
  FROM movie_companies mc
  JOIN company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
  JOIN title t ON mc.movie_id = t.id
  WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 1995 AND 2015
    AND t.kind_id = 1
    AND cn.country_code IS NOT NULL
    AND cn.country_code != ''
  GROUP BY mc.movie_id
),
ratings AS (
  SELECT movie_id, info::numeric AS rating
  FROM movie_info_idx
  WHERE info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating')
),
votes AS (
  SELECT movie_id, info::integer AS vote_count
  FROM movie_info_idx
  WHERE info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'votes')
)
SELECT 
  mcc.n_countries,
  COUNT(*) AS n_movies,
  ROUND(AVG(r.rating)::numeric, 3) AS avg_rating,
  ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY r.rating)::numeric, 2) AS median_rating,
  ROUND(AVG(v.vote_count)::numeric, 0) AS avg_votes,
  ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY v.vote_count)::numeric, 0) AS median_votes
FROM movie_country_count mcc
JOIN ratings r ON mcc.movie_id = r.movie_id
LEFT JOIN votes v ON mcc.movie_id = v.movie_id
WHERE mcc.n_countries <= 8
GROUP BY mcc.n_countries
ORDER BY mcc.n_countries;

WITH movie_country_count AS (
  SELECT 
    mc.movie_id,
    CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT cn.country_code) = 1 THEN 'single-country'
         ELSE 'multi-country'
    END AS prod_type
  FROM movie_companies mc
  JOIN company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
  JOIN title t ON mc.movie_id = t.id
  WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 1995 AND 2015
    AND t.kind_id = 1
    AND cn.country_code IS NOT NULL
    AND cn.country_code != ''
  GROUP BY mc.movie_id
),
ratings AS (
  SELECT movie_id, info::numeric AS rating
  FROM movie_info_idx
  WHERE info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating')
),
votes AS (
  SELECT movie_id, info::integer AS vote_count
  FROM movie_info_idx
  WHERE info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'votes')
)
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN v.vote_count < 100    THEN '1. <100 votes'
    WHEN v.vote_count < 1000   THEN '2. 100-999 votes'
    WHEN v.vote_count < 10000  THEN '3. 1k-9.9k votes'
    WHEN v.vote_count < 100000 THEN '4. 10k-99k votes'
    ELSE                            '5. 100k+ votes'
  END AS vote_bucket,
  ROUND(AVG(r.rating) FILTER (WHERE mcc.prod_type = 'single-country')::numeric, 3) AS single_avg,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE mcc.prod_type = 'single-country') AS single_n,
  ROUND(AVG(r.rating) FILTER (WHERE mcc.prod_type = 'multi-country')::numeric, 3) AS multi_avg,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE mcc.prod_type = 'multi-country') AS multi_n,
  ROUND((AVG(r.rating) FILTER (WHERE mcc.prod_type = 'multi-country') - 
         AVG(r.rating) FILTER (WHERE mcc.prod_type = 'single-country'))::numeric, 3) AS delta
FROM movie_country_count mcc
JOIN ratings r ON mcc.movie_id = r.movie_id
JOIN votes v ON mcc.movie_id = v.movie_id
GROUP BY vote_bucket
ORDER BY vote_bucket;

groupby_keys: CASE WHEN ((movie_info_idx_1.info)::integer < 100) THEN '1. <100 votes'::text WHEN ((movie_info_idx_1.info)::integer < 1000) THEN '2. 100-999 votes'::text WHEN ((movie_info_idx_1.info)::integer < 10000) THEN '3. 1k-9.9k votes'::text WHEN ((movie_info_idx_1.info)::integer < 100000) THEN '4. 10k-99k votes'::text ELSE '5. 100k+ votes'::text END

raw_sql:
WITH movie_country_count AS (
  SELECT 
    mc.movie_id,
    CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT cn.country_code) = 1 THEN 'single-country'
         ELSE 'multi-country'
    END AS prod_type
  FROM movie_companies mc
  JOIN company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
  JOIN title t ON mc.movie_id = t.id
  WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 1995 AND 2015
    AND t.kind_id = 1
    AND cn.country_code IS NOT NULL
    AND cn.country_code != ''
  GROUP BY mc.movie_id
),
ratings AS (
  SELECT movie_id, info::numeric AS rating
  FROM movie_info_idx
  WHERE info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating')
),
votes AS (
  SELECT movie_id, info::integer AS vote_count
  FROM movie_info_idx
  WHERE info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'votes')
)
SELECT 
  t.production_year AS yr,
  ROUND(AVG(r.rating) FILTER (WHERE mcc.prod_type = 'single-country' AND v.vote_count BETWEEN 100 AND 9999)::numeric, 3) AS single_avg,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE mcc.prod_type = 'single-country' AND v.vote_count BETWEEN 100 AND 9999) AS single_n,
  ROUND(AVG(r.rating) FILTER (WHERE mcc.prod_type = 'multi-country' AND v.vote_count BETWEEN 100 AND 9999)::numeric, 3) AS multi_avg,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE mcc.prod_type = 'multi-country' AND v.vote_count BETWEEN 100 AND 9999) AS multi_n,
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE mcc.prod_type = 'multi-country') / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0)::numeric, 1) AS multi_pct
FROM movie_country_count mcc
JOIN title t ON mcc.movie_id = t.id
JOIN ratings r ON mcc.movie_id = r.movie_id
JOIN votes v ON mcc.movie_id = v.movie_id
GROUP BY t.production_year
ORDER BY yr;

WITH movie_country_count AS (
  SELECT 
    mc.movie_id,
    CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT cn.country_code) = 1 THEN 'single-country'
         ELSE 'multi-country'
    END AS prod_type
  FROM movie_companies mc
  JOIN company_name cn ON mc.company_id = cn.id
  JOIN title t ON mc.movie_id = t.id
  WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 1995 AND 2015
    AND t.kind_id = 1
    AND cn.country_code IS NOT NULL
    AND cn.country_code != ''
  GROUP BY mc.movie_id
),
ratings AS (
  SELECT movie_id, info::numeric AS rating
  FROM movie_info_idx
  WHERE info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating')
),
votes AS (
  SELECT movie_id, info::integer AS vote_count
  FROM movie_info_idx
  WHERE info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'votes')
)
SELECT 
  mcc.prod_type,
  v_bucket.label AS vote_bucket,
  COUNT(*) AS n_movies,
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE r.rating >= 7.0) / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct_highly_rated,
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE r.rating >= 8.0) / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct_excellent,
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE r.rating < 4.0) / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct_poor
FROM movie_country_count mcc
JOIN ratings r ON mcc.movie_id = r.movie_id
JOIN votes v ON mcc.movie_id = v.movie_id
CROSS JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT CASE 
    WHEN v.vote_count < 100   THEN '1.<100'
    WHEN v.vote_count < 1000  THEN '2.100-999'
    WHEN v.vote_count < 10000 THEN '3.1k-9.9k'
    ELSE                           '4.10k+'
  END AS label
) v_bucket
GROUP BY mcc.prod_type, v_bucket.label
ORDER BY v_bucket.label, mcc.prod_type;
